title: Mundeshwari Temple
tagline: Mundeshwari Temple — spiritual town of Bihar

overview.short: The Mundeshwari Devi Temple (IAST: Muṇḍeśvarī) is a Hindu temple, located at Ramgarh Village, 608 feet (185 m) on the Mundeshwari Hills of Kaimur plateau near Son River, in the Bho
overview.description: The Mundeshwari Devi Temple (IAST: Muṇḍeśvarī) is a Hindu temple, located at Ramgarh Village, 608 feet (185 m) on the Mundeshwari Hills of Kaimur plateau near Son River, in the Bhojpuri region of Indian state of Bihar. It is an Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) protected monument since 1915. It is an ancient temple which is believed to be dedicated to the worship of the goddess Durga and god Shiva, and is claimed as the oldest functional Hindu temple in the world. The findings also established that here was a religious and educational center spread over the hillock and Mandaleshwar (Shiva)

topPlaces.name: Mokri, India
topPlaces.description: Mokari is a large village in Bhabua block of Kaimur district, Bihar, India. As of 2011, its population was 8,398, in 1,458 households.

topPlaces.name: Bhagwanpur, Kaimur
topPlaces.description: Bhagwanpur is a village and corresponding community development block in Kaimur district of Bihar, India. As of 2011, its population was 6,213, in 1,081 households, while the total block population was 91,113, in 15,145 households.

topPlaces.name: Chainpur, Kaimur
topPlaces.description: Chainpur is a village and corresponding community development block in Kaimur district of Bihar, India. It is located 11 km west of the district headquarters of Bhabua.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mundeshwari Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mundeshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mundeshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mokri, India, Bhagwanpur, Kaimur, Dumdum, Kaimur, Sarangpur, Kaimur, Betri.
